title: EpicFight-Trial
description: Added new weapon types and more animations to the "Epic Fight" mod.
body:
This mod adds new weapon types and more animations to "EpicFight", which will bring a better experience to your battles. If you are tired of the original "EpicFight" animation, please download it.
The module is in the early stage of production and the content is not rich. Currently, there is only one prototype weapon derived from the "Sekiro:Shadows Die Twice"; Stay tuned for future content!
## Current content:
The weapon "Quiver" from "Sekiro:Shadows Die Twice" has a total of five attack animations
The Tachi from 'Monster Hunter' (semi-finished product)
A new column
(Machine Translation)
